summary: Completed comprehensive testing of FightJudge Pro Fighter Portal (Phase 5). Backend APIs are 100% functional. Frontend Fighter Portal works correctly with role-based routing, dark theme, and core functionality. Minor issue with message compose button visibility in some scenarios.

ui_bugs.issue: Compose button occasionally not visible on messages page

passed_tests: Fighter Portal Dashboard displays fighter name (Marcus Johnson), nickname (The Hammer), record (12-3-0), weight class (Welterweight), gym
Fighter Portal Dashboard shows 5+ stat cards (Upcoming Bouts, Suspensions, Pending Contracts, Total Earnings, Unread Messages)
Fighter Portal has dark theme (zinc-950 background) with 7 navigation items
Fighter Profile page loads with fighter info and Edit Profile button
Fighter Profile edit functionality works - gym name can be changed and saved
Fighter Messages page loads and displays existing messages
Backend GET /api/fighter-portal/dashboard returns fighter data with record
Backend PUT /api/fighter-portal/profile updates fighter profile successfully
Backend POST /api/auth/register-fighter creates new fighter user + fighter record
All Fighter Portal backend APIs (dashboard, profile, messages, bouts, medicals, contracts, payments) return 200 status
Dark theme sidebar with zinc-900 background and proper navigation styling
